title: Air quality, health and equity implications of electrifying heavy-duty vehicles

meta_data.Data_Name: EPA grid gross loss across the United States dataset
meta_data.Data_summary: A dataset providing electricity transmission and distribution losses at a national scale used to adjust the estimated electricity demand for charging electric heavy duty vehicles before assigning that demand to electricity generation units in the vehicle to EGU remapping algorithm.
meta_data.Other_Information: Evidence: As inputs to our Vehicle-to-EGU Electricity Assignment and Emission Remapping Algorithm we use a grid gross loss across the United States from EPA 2021 refs. 69; Location: Data availability; Confidence: high

meta_data.Data_summary: A facility level electricity generation unit dataset describing plant characteristics such as location, age and capacity used to represent and modify EGU emissions and to support the assignment of added EV charging electricity demand to specific generating units.
meta_data.Other_Information: Evidence: we use the eGRID-2016 database74 for EGU details related to location age and capacity; Location: Data availability; Confidence: high

meta_data.Data_Name: US Census Bureau cartographic boundary shapefiles
meta_data.Data_summary: National cartographic boundary GIS files used as geographic inputs for the vehicle to EGU electricity assignment and emissions remapping workflow, supporting spatial alignment and regional mapping of electricity system elements.
meta_data.Other_Information: Evidence: eGRID-2016 database74 for EGU details related to location age and capacity with shapefiles from US Census Cartographic boundary shapefiles75 and NERC76; Location: Data availability; Confidence: high

meta_data.Data_summary: A geospatial dataset delineating North American Electric Reliability Corporation regions used alongside EGU information and boundary shapefiles to support the vehicle to EGU electricity assignment and emissions remapping steps.
meta_data.Other_Information: Evidence: eGRID-2016 database74 for EGU details related to location age and capacity with shapefiles from US Census Cartographic boundary shapefiles75 and NERC76; Location: Data availability; Confidence: high

meta_data.Data_Name: 2016v7.2 National Emissions Inventory NEI county total emissions
meta_data.Data_summary: A county level emissions inventory providing total anthropogenic emissions by sector used as the core emissions input to SMOKE for creating gridded baseline and scenario emissions for the WRF CMAQ simulations.
meta_data.Other_Information: Evidence: County total emissions from the 2016v7.2 National Emissions Inventory NEI64 were processed using the 2016 SMOKE Beta platform; Location: Methods Air quality model set-up and eHDV emission scenarios; Confidence: high
meta_data.Geographic_Coverage: United States > WI IL IN MI study domain counties

meta_data.Data_Name: LADCO 1.3 km spatial surrogates for emissions allocation
meta_data.Data_summary: High resolution spatial surrogate layers used to allocate county level NEI emissions to 1.3 km model grid cells using locally specific land use proxies such as population industry and road locations within the study region.
meta_data.Category: Building footprints and land use maps
meta_data.Other_Information: Evidence: 1.3 km spatial surrogated provided by the Lake Michigan Air Directors Consortium LADCO and available on request; Location: Code availability; Confidence: high
meta_data.Geographic_Coverage: United States > Southern Lake Michigan Chicago region

meta_data.Data_Name: MOVES emission factor data from EPA MOtor Vehicle Emission Simulator
meta_data.Data_summary: Vehicle emissions factor tables generated by the MOVES model for multiple heavy duty vehicle processes and factor types, used within SMOKE to compute hourly meteorology adjusted mobile source emissions for baseline and electrification scenarios.
meta_data.Other_Information: Evidence: emission factors from the MOtor Vehicle Emission Simulator MOVES49; Location: Methods Air quality model set-up and eHDV emission scenarios; Confidence: high
meta_data.Geographic_Coverage: United States > WI IL IN MI study domain counties

meta_data.Data_Name: ACS 2015-2019 5-year census tract population and demographic data via IPUMS NHGIS
meta_data.Data_summary: Census tract level age stratified population counts and demographic attributes used to compute baseline deaths and to stratify equity analyses by racial and ethnic subgroups in the health impact calculations.
meta_data.Other_Information: Evidence: Age-stratified census tract-level population and demographic data were obtained from the American Community Survey ACS 2015-2019 ref. 71; Location: Methods Health and equity impacts; Confidence: high
meta_data.Geographic_Coverage: United States > WI IL IN MI study domain census tracts

meta_data.Data_Name: Industrial Economics Inc census tract age-specific all-cause baseline mortality incidence rates IEc 2010-2015
meta_data.Data_summary: Census tract level age specific baseline all cause mortality rates in 5 year age bands derived from USALEEP abridged life tables and adapted for national health benefits analysis, used as baseline mortality inputs for estimating attributable deaths.
meta_data.Other_Information: Evidence: baseline all-cause mortality incidence rates were obtained from Industrial Economic Incorporated IEc 2010-2015 ref. 72 and are available on request; Location: Data availability; Confidence: high
meta_data.Geographic_Coverage: United States > WI IL IN MI study domain census tracts

meta_data.Data_Name: USALEEP abridged life tables underlying IEc mortality rates
meta_data.Data_summary: Public health life table data product providing small area life expectancy and mortality information that serves as the base source from which the IEc census tract mortality incidence rates used in this study are derived.
meta_data.Other_Information: Evidence: These mortality incidence rates are derived from USALEEP abridged life tables with modifications for broader use in national health benefits analyses; Location: Methods Health and equity impacts; Confidence: medium

meta_data.Data_Name: Chicago Data Portal city boundary shapefiles
meta_data.Data_summary: City of Chicago GIS boundary files used to subset or map results within Chicago city limits for the equity focused analyses and visualizations.
meta_data.Other_Information: Evidence: Chicago shapefiles are available from the Chicago Data Portal via https://data.cityofchicago.org/; Location: Code availability; Confidence: high

meta_data.Data_Name: Paper-level data deposit from Data availability model output hosted on Northwestern servers
meta_data.Data_summary: Model output files from the WRF-CMAQ baseline and electrification scenario simulations produced by the authors and stored on institutional servers, used as the primary inputs to concentration change, health impact, and equity analyses.
meta_data.Other_Information: Evidence: Model output is hosted on Northwestern’s servers Due to model output size limitation specific model output requests can be made to the corresponding author; Location: Data availability; Confidence: high
meta_data.Geographic_Coverage: United States > WI IL IN MI Southern Lake Michigan Chicago region
